pageContext.name: Hatsune Miku - Birthday 2021 (Pretty Rabbit Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Taito introduce the next figure in the Spiritale 1:7 scale figure line, Hatsune Miku in her Pretty Rabbit outfit from her Birthday celebration in 2021!  Miku is ready to party in her wonderfully frilly outfit, adorned with flowers, ribbons, and rabbit ears, while surrounded by balloons!  This anime figure commemorates Miku's 14th anniversary and is an excellent addition to any Hatsune Miku figure collection.
